prompt: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime portrait inspired by authentic late-1980s and early-1990s shoujo cel animation. Illustrate a graceful young woman with porcelain skin, large warm taupe-brown eyes, soft peach blush, glossy coral lips, and a silky jet-black chin-length bob with wispy bangs and rounded volume. Dress her in a sleeveless black-and-white gingham cotton dress. Pose her in a gentle three-quarter portrait, looking back over her shoulder with a calm, dreamy expression while standing among lush emerald foliage overflowing with vibrant orange trumpet flowers that naturally frame her face and hair. Illuminate the scene with soft diffused morning sunlight filtering through the leaves, creating delicate highlights, subtle nostalgic bloom, crisp vintage ink linework, authentic cel shading, fine paper grain, rich botanical colors, and beautifully restored ultra-detailed 8K classic shoujo anime quality.
promptEn: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime portrait inspired by authentic late-1980s and early-1990s shoujo cel animation. Illustrate a graceful young woman with porcelain skin, large warm taupe-brown eyes, soft peach blush, glossy coral lips, and a silky jet-black chin-length bob with wispy bangs and rounded volume. Dress her in a sleeveless black-and-white gingham cotton dress. Pose her in a gentle three-quarter portrait, looking back over her shoulder with a calm, dreamy expression while standing among lush emerald foliage overflowing with vibrant orange trumpet flowers that naturally frame her face and hair. Illuminate the scene with soft diffused morning sunlight filtering through the leaves, creating delicate highlights, subtle nostalgic bloom, crisp vintage ink linework, authentic cel shading, fine paper grain, rich botanical colors, and beautifully restored ultra-detailed 8K classic shoujo anime quality.
promptZh: 创作一幅超精细的复古日本动漫肖像，灵感源自 80 年代末至 90 年代初正宗的少女漫赛璐珞动画。描绘一位优雅的年轻女性，拥有瓷器般的肌肤、温暖的灰褐色大眼睛、柔和的桃色腮红、光泽的珊瑚色嘴唇，以及 丝滑的黑色齐颌短发，配有轻薄刘海和圆润发量。为她穿上 无袖黑白格纹棉布裙。让她以柔和的三分之二侧面姿态出镜，回眸望向镜头，表情平静而梦幻，身处郁郁葱葱的翡翠色叶丛中，周围点缀着 鲜艳的橙色喇叭花，自然地衬托出她的面部与秀发。场景由透过叶片洒下的柔和漫射晨光照亮，营造出精致的高光、微妙的怀旧光晕、清晰的复古墨线、地道的赛璐珞渲染、细腻的纸张纹理、浓郁的植物色彩，以及经过精美修复的 8K 超精细经典少女漫品质。
